title: Customer interview — Sunrise Bank
text:
# Interview: Sunrise Bank (Enterprise)
Date: 2026-02-20
Interviewer: UX Research

Q: What's your biggest frustration?
A: Honestly, Mobile App. It slows the whole team down and there's no 'Dark mode'.

Q: If we fixed one thing?
A: Give us 'Dark mode'. We'd expand our seat count if you did.

Q: How does this compare to alternatives?
A: A competitor already offers this, which is why we're evaluating switching.
